content:
the process of obtaining an access token to interact with the Microsoft Graph API, which provides a unified API endpoint for accessing data across various Microsoft 365 services. The process involves authentication with Azure Active Directory (AAD) and obtaining an access token.
AI Application
Requests an access token every hour
Azure Active Directory (AAD)
App-Only Authentication:
Client ID:
Client Secret:
Returns Access Token (valid ~1 hour)
Microsoft Graph API
Send Access Token in Requests
Automatic Token Renewal
JWT Access Token: eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...
New Access Token
Your Microsoft 365 Data
Teams
SharePoint
Exchange
OneDrive
The image provides a clear overview of the steps involved in obtaining an access token to interact with the Microsoft Graph API, including requesting an access token, authenticating with AAD, and renewing the token automatically.
